designRules.sceneScale: body-first; props overlap the actor or stack vertically; only sleeping keeps a full scene
designRules.horizontalBasePolicy: No rugs, desks, paths, cushions, floor strips, or bars. The approved top-down sleeping bed is the only full base scene.
exceptions: sleeping may use the user-approved hard-edged pixel Zzz sequence

states.name: Blanket Tug
states.action: Grow drowsy and pull the blanket against the body.

states.name: Top-down Sleep
states.accessory: top-down mattress, pillow, the same large blanket, and user-approved pixel Zzz
states.action: Lie flat on the pillow under the blanket; keep closed eyes and both claws visible while the blanket breathes and three Z shapes rise.

states.name: Morning Stretch
states.action: Spring upright, stretch, and let the blanket slip away.

states.name: Puzzle Turn
states.accessory: one puzzle piece between both claws
states.action: Turn the piece, compare both sides, and pause.

states.name: Tile Stack
states.action: Alternate both claws on the compact stack, then inspect.

states.name: Parcel Stack
states.accessory: one parcel and two vertically stacked helpers
states.action: Pass the parcel through the helper stack.

states.name: Stuck Jar
states.action: Twist twice, strain, then push the jar toward the owner.

states.name: Suitcase Fold
states.accessory: one open suitcase and one striped cloth
states.action: Fold the cloth progressively into the suitcase.

states.name: Workspace Folder
states.accessory: one upright folder beside the body
states.action: Pop the folder open vertically and settle into the new workspace.

states.name: Self High-five
states.action: Hop, make both claws meet overhead, and settle.

states.name: Basket Rescue
states.action: Get covered by the basket, wriggle free, stand, and get nudged again.
